message:
fix(server/shutdown): upgrade test time helpers from Relaxed to SeqCst ordering

The set_test_time / test_time helpers in shutdown tests use a global
AtomicU64 (TEST_NOW) to simulate time progression.  With Relaxed
ordering, concurrent test threads could observe stale values if the
compiler or CPU reordered stores/loads around the time updates, leading
to flaky timeout and deadline assertions.

Switch both the store in set_test_time() and the load in test_time()
to SeqCst to guarantee a single total order — any thread that calls
set_test_time(N) before a subsequent test_time() call in another thread
will always see N or a later value, never an earlier one.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
